overview.synastry_definition: A branch of astrology that examines how the positions of planets in one person's birth chart relate to those in another person's natal chart. A tool for assessing compatibility in love and understanding relationship dynamics by comparing key elements like the Sun, Moon, Venus, Mars, and more.
overview.purpose: Helps identify areas of harmony, challenges, and attraction between individuals based on their astrological profiles
overview.asteroid_role: When it comes to synastry, asteroids can come handy when trying to understand the dynamics between two people

black_moon_lilith.mythology: Unleashed, raw feminine figure who has no master and is empowered, sexual and untamed

relevance.for_longevity: Overrated and not particularly relevant for longevity and compatibility
relevance.for_chemistry: Definite indication of chemistry, especially with Venus-Lilith or Mars-Lilith contacts

synastry_effect.experience: You don't feel judged, shy, or self-conscious with your partner. Element of sexual spark and fun that keeps you interested and excited
synastry_effect.value: Would not give it more value than chemistry and sexual spark

chiron.relevance: Most definitely interesting in relationships. These themes are always present in important relationships
common_aspects: Hard or flowing contacts to personal planets

hard_aspects.chiron_moon: Element of hunger that is quite noticeable. No matter how much love and closeness you experience, there seems to be a constant need for more
hard_aspects.brings: Healing, but with painful friction throughout the process
hard_aspects.note: Relationships thrive on friction, that is what keeps us interested

chiron.requirements: Both partners need to be mature and conscious to avoid projecting own pain on partner (especially with strong Chiron)

specific_meanings.chiron_mars: Can stand for a sexually healing relationship
specific_meanings.chiron_sun: Very often present in synastry of wedded partners

specific_meanings.juno_venus: Common in synastry where there is a lot of attraction and appreciation

ceres.prominence: Often prominent in synastry, both from research and personal experience

vertex.description: So much romance around that one

research_findings.wedded_partners: Vertex aspects to North Node was a common one in wedded partners

personal_experience.significant: Aspects between Vertex and Sun to be significant in important relationships
